prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-QDCFSAS-5PC-2 Product Type: HOME Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Professional Quality Diamond Coated File Set 5pc DIY Jewelry Tool Description: This hobby file set has 5 different files for an array of different jobs and tasks whether it is for models, or detailed metal work, glass shaving, more. Easy to use and great for both novices and experts.

Each file is 7" in length and features small 2" dipped rubber handles for precision craftsmanship. Search Terms: metal working file tools tool set Features: - Overall Length: 7" (180mm) - Professional Quality - 180 Grit - Set Includes: Round, Half Round, Flat Knife, Triangle === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 5-pc 7in Diamond Coated File Set

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 5-pk 7in Diamond Coated File Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Professional Quality, 180 Grit, Round Half Round Flat Knife Triangle, Rubber Handles

openai.title_differentiation: 180 Grit, Round Half Round Flat Knife Triangle Files, 2" Rubber Handles, Metal Glass Jewelry Model Work
